scripts.record: pnpm build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,record "pnpm start:all" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3200 http://127.0.0.1:8100/__control --timeout 120000 && APP_PORT=3200 RECORD_MODE=1 playwright test --workers 1 && node e2e/assert-redactions.mjs"
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,replay "pnpm start:no-backend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3200 http://127.0.0.1:8100/__control --timeout 120000 && APP_PORT=3200 playwright test --retries 1"
scripts.test:e2e:ci: pnpm run record && pnpm run test:e2e
